content:
About

I'm Jesse Page, a freelance food photographer based in Williamsburg, Brooklyn. Editorial, restaurant, brand, and cookbook work — shot in warm natural light, earth tones, textured surfaces. Six years solo, BFA from Prattfield Institute of Art. I work tethered, mostly in window light, and I like the food to look like food.
title: About

content:
Contact

For editorial, restaurant, brand, and cookbook commissions, reach me at jesse.page@jessepagephotography.com or through my agent, Tomás Herrera at Herrera Creative Mgmt. Based in Williamsburg, Brooklyn; available across NYC. See more work on Instagram @jessepagephoto.
title: Contact

content:
Pricing

Editorial day rate $1,800–$2,200. Restaurant half-day from $1,200, standard package is a 25-shot deliverable. Brand work $500–$3,000 per deliverable. Cookbook projects quoted per scope. Bookings and licensing handled through Herrera Creative Mgmt — get in touch and I'll send a tailored quote.
title: Pricing
